examples: In 1482, the kingdom was carved into three: Kathmandu, Patan, and Bhadgaon.
Students in Nepal display notebooks distributed by Patan West Rotarians, describing iodine deficiency disorder and its prevention.
The main tour cities in Nepal are the capital Kathmandu, the second biggest city Patan, the third biggest city Bhaktapur and the famous scenery site Pokhara.
These were the Namunaghar of Bhaktapur (2004) and the Ayuguthi Sattal of Patan (2005) which were awarded the Honourable Mention and the Award of Merit respectively.
The exhibition will be launched on 6 November 2012 at 5:30 pm at the Patan Dhoka Pipalbot Chautari and will be for free and open to the public until 10 November 2012.
